subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath, at all times, enjoined upon all to show forth love, fellowship, affection and unity, and to manifest wisdom and utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در جمیع احیان کل را بمحبت و وداد و مودت و اتحاد و حکمت و بیان امر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
